performance.notes: No load testing performed — local dev tool. blockRunByComment is synchronous O(1) file I/O.

owasp_checks.notes: No auth layer — intentional for local dev tool.
blockedReason.text is serialized only; never eval'd or used in shell commands.
PIPELINE_NO_SPAWN test hook documented and isolated to test env.

owasp_checks.category: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures
owasp_checks.notes: Atomic write-tmp-rename pattern used for run.json.
Pipeline log snapshots comment text — potential PII leak if questions contain sensitive data.

test_cases.description: findActiveRunByTaskId returns run for status=blocked
findActiveRunByTaskId returns null for completed/failed/interrupted
blockRunByComment blocks run between stages with blockedReason
blockRunByComment does NOT block when stage is mid-execution
unblockRunByComment resumes when last question resolved
unblockRunByComment updates blockedReason to second question when first resolved
unblockRunByComment does nothing when run is not blocked
POST /block on unknown runId → 404 RUN_NOT_FOUND
GET /block → 405 Method Not Allowed
POST /block on running pipeline → 200 status=blocked
POST /block on already-blocked run → 200 idempotent
POST /unblock on unknown runId → 404 RUN_NOT_FOUND
GET /unblock → 405 Method Not Allowed
POST /unblock on blocked run → 200 status=running
POST /unblock on running run → 422 RUN_NOT_BLOCKED
POST /block on completed run → 422 RUN_IN_TERMINAL_STATE
POST /block on failed run → 422 RUN_IN_TERMINAL_STATE
Blocked run appears in GET /runs list with correct status
handleStageClose guard blocks run after stage completes with unresolved question
GET /runs/:runId returns full blockedReason object
Resolving question auto-resumes pipeline to completion
2 questions: resolving first keeps blocked, second becomes blockedReason
POST /resume manually resumes blocked run, clears blockedReason
POST /stop transitions blocked run to interrupted
Note comment does NOT block pipeline
Question on paused (checkpoint) run → blockRunByComment blocks immediately
POST type=note creates comment (201)
Run status remains running after note comment
Task includes comment in GET response
Note comment does not set resolved=true initially
POST type=question creates comment (201)
Run status transitions to blocked after question comment
Run detail has blockedReason with correct commentId
POST /block on already-blocked run is idempotent (200)
POST type=answer with parentId creates answer comment (201)
Run remains blocked until question is marked resolved
PATCH resolved=true unblocks run (no remaining questions)
Resolved question has resolved=true persisted on task
First question blocks the run
Second question on blocked run keeps it blocked
Resolving first question does not unblock run (second still open)
Resolving second question unblocks run (all resolved)
POST type=question succeeds with no active run (201)
Comment persisted on task (no-run case)
PATCH resolved=true on comment with no run succeeds (200)
POST answer type without parentId is accepted (API level)
POST comment to unknown taskId returns 404 TASK_NOT_FOUND
POST comment to unknown spaceId returns 404 SPACE_NOT_FOUND
POST question without author returns 400 VALIDATION_ERROR
PATCH unknown commentId returns 404 COMMENT_NOT_FOUND
Question comment while stage is mid-execution: comment created (201)
Run status NOT immediately blocked when stage is mid-execution
POST /unblock on run with blockedReason: blockedReason cleared in response
test_cases.notes: Not covered by existing tests. Static analysis confirms bug. See BUG-001.
